# IBP Multi-Agent Development Contract
**Generated by Agent 0 (Coordinator)**
**Date:** 2026-01-29

---

## Shared Data Structures

### Profile Object (ALL agents must use this format)

```python
profile = {
    "platform": "vk|ok|telegram|instagram",
    "url": "https://...",
    "username": "...",
    "display_name": "...",
    "photo_url": "...",
    "city": "...",
    "age": 28,
    "bio": "...",
    "phones": ["+7..."],
    "emails": ["...@..."],
    "workplace": "...",
    "friends": [],
    "groups": [],
    "confidence": 0.85
}
```

### Connection Object

```python
connection = {
    "source_id": "profile_url_or_id",
    "target_id": "profile_url_or_id",
    "connection_type": "friend|colleague|family|group_member",
    "strength": 0.8,
    "evidence": "How discovered",
    "platform": "vk|ok|telegram"
}
```

### Graph Data (for vis.js visualization)

```python
graph = {
    "nodes": [
        {"id": "1", "label": "Name", "group": "person", "image": "url"}
    ],
    "edges": [
        {"from": "1", "to": "2", "label": "friend", "value": 0.9}
    ]
}
```

---

## File Ownership

| Agent | Owns (can create/modify) | Enhances (careful modification) |
|-------|--------------------------|--------------------------------|
| 0 | AGENT_CONTRACT.md, AGENT_STATUS.md | - |
| 1 | app/services/phase4/research_orchestrator.py | app/services/phase2/combined_search.py |
| 2 | app/services/phase4/vk_people_search.py | app/services/phase2/vk_*.py |
| 3 | app/services/phase4/telegram_search.py | existing telegram files |
| 4 | app/services/phase4/ok_people_search.py | app/services/phase2/ok_*.py |
| 5 | app/services/phase4/entity_resolver.py, connection_analyzer.py | app/services/phase2/username_intelligence.py |
| 6 | app/models/connection.py, app/routes/phase4.py, templates/graph.html, people_search.html | app/models/investigation.py, app/__init__.py |

---

## Communication Protocol

1. Agents signal completion by updating `AGENT_STATUS.md`
2. Completion signals:
   - `CONTRACT READY` - Agent 0
   - `DATABASE READY` - Agent 6
   - `INTERFACES READY` - Agent 6
   - `ENTITY RESOLVER READY` - Agent 5
   - `VK SEARCH READY` - Agent 2
   - `TG SEARCH READY` - Agent 3
   - `OK SEARCH READY` - Agent 4
   - `ORCHESTRATION READY` - Agent 1

---

## Git Protocol

- Commit after each successful milestone
- Format: `"Agent X: [description]"`
- Push to `origin main` after each commit
- Always pull before making changes to shared files

---

## Activation Order

```
Agent 0 (Coordinator)     → FIRST
         ↓
Agent 6 (Frontend/DB)     → After Agent 0
         ↓
Agent 5 (Entity Resolver) → After Agent 6
         ↓
Agents 2,3,4 (VK,TG,OK)   → After Agent 5 (parallel)
         ↓
Agent 1 (Orchestrator)    → LAST
```

---

## Existing Infrastructure (DO NOT DUPLICATE)

### Phase 2 Services (Already Implemented)
- `app/services/phase2/combined_search.py` - Phase 2 orchestrator
- `app/services/phase2/vk_api_extractor.py` - VK data extraction
- `app/services/phase2/ok_checker.py` - OK profile checking
- `app/services/phase2/username_intelligence.py` - Username analysis
- `app/services/phase2/profile_scraper.py` - Multi-platform scraping
- `app/services/phase2/breach_checker.py` - Breach data lookup
- `app/services/phase2/holehe_service.py` - Email service detection
- `app/services/phase2/yaseeker_service.py` - Yandex services lookup

### Models (Extend, Don't Replace)
- `app/models/investigation.py` - Main investigation model with JSON serialization

### Key Patterns to Follow
- JSON serialization: `_field` (string) + `field` property (Python object)
- Async tasks: Use `TaskStatus` pattern from `phase1.py`
- Error handling: Return `{"error": "message"}` on failure
